title: catocoma floribunda
intro: Catocoma floribunda, a type of flowering plant, is a species within the family Boraginaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and as an expectorant to loosen phlegm. Catocoma floribunda has been used to ease symptoms of bronchitis and coughs due to its health benefits in reducing inflammation and promoting relaxation. Herbal preparations of Catocoma floribunda often involve infusions or decoctions, which can be consumed as teas or taken orally in capsule form.
